TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tunde_Adebimpe, title = Tunde_Adebimpe, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tunde_Adebimpe} }

S.FORM: Tunde Adebimpe kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Tunde Adebimpe, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Tunde Adebimpe kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Tunde Adebimpe, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tun*e a*eβimpe kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tun*e a*eβimpe, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
